checkpoints.name: Checkpoint Charlie
checkpoints.note: The most famous crossing. Allied/foreigners only.

checkpoints.name: Bornholmer Straße
checkpoints.note: First crossing breached, night of Nov 9, 1989.

checkpoints.name: Checkpoint Bravo (Dreilinden)
checkpoints.note: Main road crossing for Allied forces, Berlin to West Germany.

checkpoints.name: Friedrichstraße Station
checkpoints.note: Train and S-Bahn checkpoint. The Tränenpalast (Palace of Tears).

checkpoints.name: Sonnenallee
checkpoints.note: Pedestrian and vehicle crossing in Neukölln.

watchtowers.name: Erna-Berger-Straße tower
watchtowers.note: Round watchtower near Potsdamer Platz. Last surviving of its type.

watchtowers.name: Kieler Eck command tower
watchtowers.note: Günter Litfin Memorial. Command tower with seasonal museum.

watchtowers.name: Schlesischer Busch tower
watchtowers.note: Four-storey command tower in Treptow. Once supervised 18 other towers.
